use_cases: Adds animated ripple effects following mouse movement across the viewport
Creates visual feedback on user interaction for enhanced engagement
Provides adaptive cursor visualization with dark/light mode color variants
Serves as a decorative overlay to enhance page aesthetics
Works as a full-screen canvas layer that doesn't interfere with underlying content
ai_summary: A canvas-based animated cursor overlay that generates expanding ripple circles following mouse movement. The effect adapts colors based on dark/light mode (cyan aqua for dark mode, blue for light mode), with each ripple fading out as it expands. Designed as a decorative full-screen overlay with pointer-events disabled to allow interaction with underlying content.
